changeSet.author: openelis-gbd-fix
changeSet.comment: Remove incorrect GBD page role assignments

changeSet.author: openelis-gbd-fix

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Add role restrictions for Registration per permission matrix

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1)
